backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the press kit backend, managing content fields (about text, features, game details, social links), user profiles, password protection, and admin-gated mutations using AccessControl and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the PressKitPage scrolling fix (removing overflow:hidden from root/parent containers) was implemented in frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app, loading Fredoka One and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with three routes (/,  /press-kit, /admin), QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and a BodyTextColorApplier that syncs the backend's body text color to a CSS variable.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Fullscreen image overlay dialog with Escape key and click-to-close support, locking body scroll while open.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Minimal site header showing only a Press Kit nav link and dark/light mode toggle, hidden entirely on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Reusable image component that shows an animated skeleton while loading and a text fallback on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button component that programmatically triggers a ZIP file download of all press kit screenshots.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup form with email input and subscribe button, intended as a placeholder for future integration.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: A modal component that prompts users to enter a password to access the press kit, verifying it against the backend actor and storing the result in sessionStorage on success.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Displays a grid of six game screenshots as clickable thumbnails that open a fullscreen viewer when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Renders an Instagram link with icon if a valid URL is provided, otherwise renders nothing.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Shows a video thumbnail with a play button that, when clicked, replaces itself with an embedded YouTube iframe using the extracted video ID.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a light/dark theme context with persistence via localStorage, toggling dark-mode CSS classes on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, initializing admin access control when an identity is present, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting the delegated identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a collection of React Query read hooks for fetching press kit content fields (about text, features, game details, social links, etc.) and mutation hooks for updating them via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and utility styles for background, typography, screenshots, and fullscreen viewer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page allowing authenticated admins to edit press kit content fields (about, features, game details, links, password protection) via Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page that shows the game logo and a newsletter signup iframe, and conditionally displays a password gate modal before redirecting to the press kit.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Press kit page displaying game logo, YouTube video, about text, game details, features, screenshots, and social links, with a redirect guard if password protection is enabled and unverified.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 25) including a summary of the press kit webpage, architectural notes, a list of known issues, and existing feature definitions with requirement IDs and versions.
